description: Google's Abusive Experience Report service provides data about sites with abusive or misleading experiences, including per-site summaries and a list of violating sites. It is part of Google's web tools ecosystem for publishers and site owners.
summary: 1 HTTP API: Google's Abusive Experience Report API at `https://abusiveexperiencereport.googleapis.com`, authenticated with either a Google Cloud API key or a Google OAuth 2.0 user access token.
